login.title: Sign in
login.emailInvalid: Email must be a valid format.
login.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 12 characters.
login.totpPrompt: Enter the code from your authenticator app

errors.oauthExpired: OAuth session expired, please try again.
errors.oauthNoEmail: No email retrieved from the provider.

register.subtitle: Create your account
register.emailInvalid: Email must be a valid format.
register.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 12 characters.
register.verifySent: A verification code has been sent to

success.codeSent: A new code has been sent.

forgot.subtitle: Password reset
forgot.emailInvalid: Email must be a valid format.
forgot.codeSentTo: A code has been sent to
forgot.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 6 characters.
forgot.encryptedExplain: Your data was encrypted. Do you have your recovery key?
forgot.skipWarning: Without a recovery key, all your encrypted data will be permanently lost.
forgot.skipConfirm: Are you sure? All your encrypted data will be permanently lost.
forgot.doneMessage: Your password has been reset successfully.

errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.codeInvalid: Invalid or expired code. Please try again.
errors.noRecoveryKey: No recovery key found on the server.

success.codeResent: A new code has been sent.

unlock.title: Unlock your data
unlock.explain: Your data is encrypted. Enter your password to access it.
unlock.repairExplain: Your encryption key is out of sync with your password. Enter your recovery key and current password to resync.
unlock.repairCta: Repair synchronization with my recovery key
unlock.recoveryKeyPlaceholder: Paste your recovery key (64 hex characters)
unlock.currentPasswordPlaceholder: The password you just signed in with

errors.repairFailed: Invalid recovery key or resync error.

encryptionSetup.title: End-to-end encryption
encryptionSetup.subtitle: Your data will be encrypted locally. Only you can access it.
encryptionSetup.warningBody: If you lose both your password AND your recovery key, your data will be permanently lost. There is no way to recover it.
encryptionSetup.confirmPasswordPrompt: Confirm your password to enable encryption:

errors.migrationFailed: Data migration failed. Please try again.

passphraseModal.title: Encryption passphrase
passphraseModal.intro: Your account uses Google sign-in. Set a passphrase to protect your encrypted data. It will be required at every sign-in.

recoveryKey.title: Recovery key
recoveryKey.importantBody: This key is your only way to recover your data if you forget your password. Save it somewhere safe. It will not be shown again.
recoveryKey.label: Recovery key
recoveryKey.saved: I have saved this key in a safe place

settings.title: Account settings
settings.subtitle: Manage your personal profile and security settings

password.title: Password
password.subtitleSet: Set a password to sign in without Google.
password.label: Password
password.minLength: Password must be at least 12 characters.

feedback.set: Password set successfully. You can now sign in with email + password.
feedback.outOfSync: Current password is incorrect or data is out of sync. Sign out, then use "Repair" on the unlock page.

twoFactor.title: Two-factor authentication
twoFactor.subtitle: Protect your account with a TOTP app.
twoFactor.enabledExplain: 2FA is enabled on your account. To disable it, enter your password.
twoFactor.scanExplain: Scan this QR code with your authenticator app (Google Authenticator, Authy, etc.)
twoFactor.setupExplain: Add an extra layer of security by enabling two-factor authentication. You'll need an app like Google Authenticator or Authy.

encryption.title: End-to-end encryption
encryption.subtitle: Your data is encrypted locally before being sent to the server.
encryption.notActiveExplain: Encryption is not enabled yet. Enable it to protect your data.
encryption.protectedNote: Your data is protected with AES-256-GCM encryption.

danger.title: Danger zone
danger.deleteWarning: This action is irreversible. All your data will be permanently deleted.
danger.confirmMessage: This action is final and irreversible. All your data, including your encrypted data, will be permanently deleted. No recovery will be possible.

hero.subtitle: An app to manage accounts, envelopes, appointments and prescriptions for the whole family. Encrypted client-side. The server sees nothing.
hero.screenshotAlt: DashFlow screenshot: member dashboard view — budget, medication and appointment KPIs

budget.subtitle: Income, direct debits, annual bills, spending, disposable income. Multi-account, multi-member, projections, stats — without automatic bank connection.
budget.screenshotAlt: Bank account view with KPIs for income, bills, spending and remaining balance

envelopes.title: Envelopes
envelopes.description: Categorize savings, vacation, equipment and taxes. Track progress toward each goal.

loans.title: Loans & debts
loans.description: Due dates, accumulated interest, remaining principal. Full history per household member.

recurrences.title: Recurring
recurrences.description: Monthly bills, annual bills, one-time or recurring transfers. Automatic 12-month projection.

medical.subtitle: Each member's care journey in a single view. Encrypted documents, low-stock alerts, consultation calendar.
medical.screenshotAlt: Medical view: list of family patients with their alerts and appointments

medications.title: Medications
medications.description: Stock, dosage, estimated days remaining. Automatic alerts when a treatment runs low.

documents.title: Documents
documents.description: Blood tests, certificates, prescriptions. S3 storage encrypted client-side before upload.

appointments.title: Appointments
appointments.description: Calendar by patient and practitioner. Consultation history, reasons, reports.

stack.subtitle: All cryptography runs in the browser. The backend sees opaque JSON. If the server is compromised, the attacker walks away with random bytes.
stack.frontendDescription: Angular 21 zoneless · Signals · Standalone components · Tailwind v4
stack.backendDescription: Hono · PostgreSQL 17 · Drizzle ORM · Argon2id · JWT rotation
stack.chartsDescription: Area, donut, bar — hand-written SVG, zero JS dependency.
stack.architectureDescription: Clean Architecture · Isolated domain · Vitest tests · GitHub Actions CI

cta.titleLine1: Read the code, run the demo,
cta.subtitle: The demo is open, the code is public, install takes a few minutes with Docker.
